hero.title_part2: and the emotion of the moment.
hero.subtitle: Author Photography

architecture.title: Architecture & Interior Photography
architecture.description: Highlighting design intent, pure lines, and the interaction of light with materials. Ideal for architecture studios and construction companies.

portrait.title: Documentary & Editorial Portrait
portrait.description: Capturing human essence without artifice. Portraits that tell a story through gaze and environment. Includes Personal Brand Portrait for professionals.

brand.title: Brand Content (Product & Lifestyle)
brand.description: I document the honesty of your process to connect with your audience. Delivery of visual material that doesn't look like advertising, but real life.

everyday.title: Chronicle of the Everyday
everyday.description: Personal projects, street photography, and those 'bitter drinks' in black and white. Author vision that positions your artistic work. Option to purchase prints.

consulting.title: Consulting & Visual Direction
consulting.description: Strategic accompaniment for brands seeking a coherent, minimalist, and high-impact visual aesthetic.

cta.description: More than a quote, I seek a conversation about projects with soul. Tell me your idea and let's find the best way to visualize it through the lens.

about.title: The story behind the lens
about.quote: I am the soul behind the lens that captures stories and immortalizes them to be told forever. Photography is my leap of faith in the face of the world's indifference.
about.subtitle: Capturing the structure of the invisible
about.paragraph1: Exploring the relationship between space and who inhabits it, my photography seeks perfection in geometry and honesty in emotion. I don't just capture places; I document the way light and shadows transform our perception of reality.
about.paragraph2: My approach combines the technical rigor of architecture with the sensitivity of a silent observer. I don't chase the light; I wait for the moment when the shadow reveals the true form of things.
about.paragraph3: My photography is an exercise in silence and observation, where the geometry of spaces ceases to be concrete to become feeling and narrate stories. I believe in the honesty of reflection and in the strength of a gaze that finds order in visual chaos. Each capture is a commitment to pure emotion, frozen between lines, shadows, and the architecture of the invisible.

contact.description: Available for national and international projects. Tell me your idea and let's find the best way to visualize it.

form.message_label: Tell me more about your story and we'll immortalize your ideas *

footer.quote: Where architecture finds its shadow, that's where my story begins.
